## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] If I changed the Rust data model, I updated `src/types.ts` to match
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` (and `README.md` if user-facing)
